💰 Set Fee Amounts for This Student

Enter the amounts billed for each fee category per term. Leave 0 if not applicable.

📤 Bulk Import Students from Spreadsheet

Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file with your student list. The system will read each row, match your columns, preview the data, and create all accounts at once. Fees are automatically filled from the Term Fee Schedule if set.

Not sure of the format? Download the template first.
📂

Drop your spreadsheet here or click to browse

Supports Excel (.xlsx, .xls) and CSV files

🗂️ Step 2 — Map Your Columns

Tell the system which column in your spreadsheet matches each field. Columns detected:

✅ Step 3 — Preview & Confirm

Green rows are ready to import. Yellow rows have missing optional fields. Red rows have errors and will be skipped.

📋 Term Fee Schedule

Set the fee amounts for each grade level and term here. When you save, all existing students in that grade will have their fees updated automatically, and all new students added to that grade will inherit these amounts.

👆

Select a grade level above to set its fees.

📊 Current Fee Schedule Overview

All saved fee schedules across all grades and terms.

⚙️ Fee Categories Reference

These are the fee categories applied to all students. BECE Registration applies to JHS only.

  • School Fees (Tuition)
  • PTA Levy
  • Uniform / Dress
  • Books & Stationery
  • Examination Fees
  • Computer / ICT Levy
  • BECE Registration (JHS only)

👥 User Management Admin Only

Manage who can access the system. Admin accounts can do everything. Staff accounts can view student accounts and record payments, but cannot add/delete students, change settings, or manage users.

➕ Add New User

🗑️ Reset System

This will delete ALL student records. This cannot be undone.
